calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Appointment Of Receiver And To Appoint Richard B Cole As Receiver
Off Calendar Jan-15-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. Plaintiff Creditors Trade Association's motion for appointment of receiver is taken off calendar, at the request of the moving party. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN. Not reported.

Notice Of Motion Tom Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery; And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions;
Off Calendar Sep-14-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Creditors Trade Association's motion to compel responses to post judgment interrogatories and request for production of documents is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objections within 21 days of notice of this order. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $340 shall be paid within 21 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-18-2007 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar May-08-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: P. Dias, CSR: Dave Davenport.
Robert Resner, Esq., for Plaintiff: Creditors Trade Association, Inc., DBA Great Western Collection Bureau.
Plaintiff's Witnesses: Renee Traver, U.S. Food Service General Credit Manager, and Gary Looney, President of Creditors Trade Association were sworn and examined.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Ronald Degrande, aka Ronald D.Degrande, aka Ron D. Grande, individually dba Moore's Riberboat, as follows:
Damages: $26,455.47
PreJudgment Interest: $2,237.72
Costs $380.00
Total Judgment: $29,073.19
Counsel stipulated to the return of exhibit
Judgment signed in open court.
